name: angular-component-specialist
description: Specialized agent for Angular 19 standalone component development following the Floating AI Copilot conventions
scope: Angular components, services, routing, and state management

rules.description: All components must use standalone: true pattern
rules.requires: No NgModule definitions, each component explicitly imports needed modules

rules.description: Components follow {feature}.component.ts naming with matching .html and .css files
rules.structure: Each component has 3 files: .ts, .html, .css in same directory

rules.description: Component classes use {Feature}Component naming with PascalCase
CommonModule required for *ngIf, *ngFor, async pipe. HttpClientModule for API calls.
Inject services via constructor, Angular DI automatically resolves from app.config.ts providers
Use HttpClient.get<Type>(URL) with .subscribe({ next, error }) pattern
rules.corsOrigin: CORS policy configured on backend for http://localhost:4200

rules.description: Implement OnInit for initialization logic (data fetching, subscriptions)
rules.template: export class Feature implements OnInit { ngOnInit(): void { } }

rules.description: Routes defined in app.routes.ts as Routes[] constant, imported into app.config.ts
rules.template: export const routes: Routes = [{ path: 'feature', component: FeatureComponent }];

rules.description: Handle errors in subscribe error callback, log to console for debugging
Use boolean flags for loading states, bind to templates for UX feedback
rules.example: loading = false; ... this.loading = true; ... this.loading = false;

rules.description: Strict null checking enabled, declare types explicitly
Test files follow {component}.spec.ts naming, use Jasmine describe/it blocks

basicComponent.description: Pattern for a basic Angular 19 standalone component

httpService.description: Pattern for a dedicated HTTP service

implementationStatus.currentState: Minimal MVP with single root component making direct HTTP calls
criticalIssues: MUST REFACTOR: HttpClient directly in component (line 31-37), should be in Service
MUST REFACTOR: Using 'any' type instead of typed interfaces
Memory leak risk: No unsubscribe pattern (missing takeUntil or async pipe)
todoInOrder: Create core/ folder structure with api.service.ts
Move HttpClient logic from AppComponent to api.service.ts
Extract API base URL to environment.ts
Create shared/ folder with reusable components
Add takeUntil(destroy$) pattern or use async pipe in template

buildCommand: ng build @ production files in dist/
